data.content: Implementation review approved. Verified the conversation log pulldown entries now show both date and time, keep a single visible conversation identifier as #<conversation> <sessionId>, and avoid duplicated Prompt/Take numbering by displaying only Prompt #<n> when the values are equivalent. Scope remained limited to the pulldown formatting/data helpers and focused formatter tests. Sanity gates re-run in .worktrees/foolery-284e: bun run lint (passes with one pre-existing React Compiler warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build all passed.
